# openphigs-source-build

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Target | phigs |
| Type | source-reimplementation-build |
| Status | planned |

## Public Notes

Planned reproduction recipe for building OpenPHIGS as a public PHIGS/OpenGL reimplementation while keeping license review visible.

## Environment

- clean checkout of the public OpenPHIGS repository at the recorded openphigs-main-head commit
- C compiler and graphics dependencies selected from public repository documentation
- license review retained as an explicit review step before any mirrored archival master
- public PHIGS/OpenGL validation input or minimal procedural test
- local build transcript and validation notes captured as derived metadata

## Steps

- clone or update the public OpenPHIGS source repository listed in the artifact record
- verify the local checkout commit against the openphigs-main-head snapshot record
- review SourceForge metadata, repository notes, and license files before mirroring or packaging any source archive
- identify compiler, OpenGL backend, and PHIGS interface assumptions from public files
- compile the public source reimplementation in a clean environment
- run a minimal public-safe PHIGS/OpenGL smoke test when available
- record build commands, license-review notes, diagnostics, outputs, and dependency gaps as public metadata

## Expected Outputs

- source snapshot manifest
- license-review notes
- build environment manifest
- compiler transcript
- library output inventory
- public-safe PHIGS/OpenGL smoke-test notes
- dependency gap list

## Artifacts

- openphigs-source-reimplementation
- phigs-standard-public-metadata
- phigs-nist-validation-tests
